ecoreview 0.1.41
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Package index

All functions

apply_deleted_row_styling()
Apply deleted row styling to DataTable
apply_edited_styling()
Apply edited cell styling to DataTable
apply_restored_row_styling()
Apply restored interaction styling to DataTable
build_evidence_index()
Build a pre-injected evidence index for the OCR viewer
cleanup_temp_files()
Clean up old temporary files
collect_benchmark_results()
Collect all benchmark trial results into a single CSV
combine_db()
Combine part databases back into a single database
compute_duplicate_rate()
Compute duplicate rate across benchmark trials
convert_edit_value()
Convert edited cell value to the appropriate type
create_styled_datatable()
Create a styled DataTable with consistent options
create_temp_pdf_for_display()
Create temporary PDF file for web display
extract_sentences_from_markdown()
Extract sentences from HTML or markdown text
get_all_edited_cells()
Get all edited cells for styling
get_audit_trail()
Get audit trail for document
get_highlight_matches()
Get highlight match segments for client-side marking
get_restored_interaction_ids()
Get restored interaction IDs for styling
highlight_similar_text()
Highlight similar text using direct text matching
process_delete_with_renumbering()
Process delete with renumbering
render_tensorlake_html()
Render tensorlake JSON content to HTML for Shiny display
resolve_pdf_path()
Resolve a PDF file path using a cascade of fallback strategies
run_app()
Run the ecoreview Shiny application
split_db()
Split a database into roughly equal pieces for parallel review
standardize_benchmark_names()
Standardize names across benchmark replicates

Developed by Nathan Layman.

Site built with pkgdown 2.1.3.
